programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: An epic historic adventure set during the turbulent times of the Three Kingdoms. Cao Cao attempts to enlist Guan Yu into his forces, but Guan is loyal to his sworn brother Liu Bei, who is also Cao’s enemy. As Guan tries to rescue Liu Bei’s concubine from Cao, he is forced to fight his way through. Can he succeed in the end?

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Keisha is apprehensive about the team's next zombie, which may hurt the potential resale. Add to that a bad foundation and the discovery of termites, this potential flip seems more like a potential flop.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars — no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Pigs in a blanket are the quintessential party finger food. The problem is, you can never eat just one! These full-sized hotdogs wrapped in soft challah are the perfect solution.

programme.title: A Nurse To Die For
programme.desc: A father hires a live-in nurse to help care for his sick daughter, however, as she suffers a series of setbacks, he starts to wonder if the nurse might actually be the one keeping her sick.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: They meet the finest biker of Jiri Mountain, a poet who fled city life to live in the mountains. From this poet, who captures photos of stars and flowers, the two actors learn poetry.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Today contestants must utilise an air fryer to bring the judges a dish worthy of the Top 10. The winner will score a $5,000 Harvey Norman voucher to help deck out their kitchen.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The bottom three cooks from yesterday’s Mystery Box must now fight to save their spot in the competition. Today’s Pressure Test is set by award-winning pastry chef and culinary innovator Philip Khoury.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The top nine contestants compete across two rounds for a chance at winning immunity. In Round 1, contestants are split into three teams of three and must choose their champ to represent the team.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to make a beautiful, quick-cooking white ragu sauce that she'll serve over ribbony pappardelle pasta, cooked al dente style.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Semi-dried tomatoes are a new staple in American grocery stores. Rachael demonstrates how to use them as the star in her recipe for a pesto paired with broccolini and served with sausage.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Sometimes the best meals are kept locked behind closed doors, but in this episode host Michael Yo has the keys to some of the most special and secret dining spaces around.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Duke stumbles upon a potential diamond in the rough estate sale. The team ventures out to discover the house that sits on an overgrown jungle of a yard, where a detached unit is hidden among the weeds.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today, we’ll introduce you to popular "no-interior" homes. We’ll showcase the "Self-Made 3 No House," where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the "Hide-and-Seek House".

programme.title: A Roommate To Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: A cancelled flight to a dream vacation sends a mother over the edge. A pilot has no choice but to restrain an allegedly intoxicated man. Reports of gunshots at JFK causes complete pandemonium.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: A combative passenger responds with punches when asked to follow FAA regulations. When air marshals attempt to remove a man from the wing of a stationary aircraft, he plummets to the ground.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Always game to try new things, Theresa and Kiana attend a line-dancing class in Dallas. While there, Theresa conducts an impromptu group reading that leaves several cowboys in tears.

programme.title: Secrets In The Desert
programme.desc: A romantic road trip turns into a woman's desperate search for answers when the car she and her boyfriend are driving breaks down in a creepy backwater town. Then the boyfriend vanishes.

programme.title: A Nurse To Die For
programme.desc: A father hires a live-in nurse to help care for his sick daughter, however, as she suffers a series of setbacks, he starts to wonder if the nurse might actually be the one keeping her sick.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Theresa is a nervous wreck trying to figure out what to pack for her first visit to the UK. Before departing she sages Victoria's house and brings a pre-housewarming gift to encourage her to move out.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: In this episode, host Michael Yo takes viewers on five mind-blowing dining adventures that push the limits of imagination and exceed all culinary expectations!

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Dolmar thinks he hit a homerun with a zombie outside Tampa. As they start to renovate, it's discovered that this house will need a new roof, flooring and an industrial clean-out of the in-ground pool.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo goes beneath it all to find five of the most unusual dining adventures below and beyond! Dive down twenty feet under the sea for North Atlantic seafood in Norway.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what it would be like to go back in time for a dining experience from a bygone era? In this episode, host Michael Yo transports viewers to a 1920s-style New York City speakeasy.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: In this episode, Rachael cooks up a “meaty” stuffed eggplant.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a beloved family meal of chicken piccata and lemon risotto using locally sourced Italian wine, lemons, and herbs.

programme.title: A Roommate To Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.title: The Man in the Guesthouse
programme.desc: When a young couple finds someone to rent out their garage, they're happy to have an additional source of income. But soon they realise that their lodger may not be the dream tenant that they thought.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: Nam-gil and Sang-yoon arrive at the end of Korea, at the beautiful Mihwangsa Temple in Haenam, with a stunning view of the South Sea. They spend a day at the temple, with the head monk.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It’s freight to plate in this elimination, as the contestants choose from international destinations to inspire their cooking. The top eight spots are up for grabs.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: With immunity up for grabs for the top two dishes, the contestants pull out all the stops to impress the judges from a mystery box full of local ingredients.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The contestants have a day to take in the sights of Doha to inspire their fine dining degustation menu when the six cooks still on the hunt for immunity will cook at the Michelin starred IDAM restaurant.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to spice up a charred tomato sauce and pasta dinner in two ways. In one dish she's serving the pasta over sausage and in the other she pairs the pasta with chickpeas.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining out takes flight into the world of fantasy when host Michael Yo shows us that make-believe experiences can be really tasty. First stop is a restaurant in New York City's Financial District.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Touched by the heartfelt advice of special judge Jin Goo, some actors are moved to tears. But before they can recover from the emotional moment, the final mission at the Casting House is announced.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to prepare a meat-free holiday meal that everyone will love! First, she makes a flavourful soup using Italian pumpkins. Next, she prepares her family's traditional "Holiday Stars".

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: With rapid societal changes, diverse family structures are emerging beyond traditional norms. In this final episode, we’ll explore "customised family interiors" tailored to various family structures.

programme.title: Abducted At An HBCU: A Black Girl Missing Movie
programme.desc: When ambitious college student Shannon disappears due to financial struggles, her counselor Ellen discovers a trafficking ring targeting students like her and must fight to rescue Shannon.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Touched by the heartfelt advice of special judge Jin Goo, some actors are moved to tears. But before they can recover from the emotional moment, the final mission at the Casting House is announced.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from one of his husband's favourite dishes as a child, Jake makes celery-root remoulade and adds a European twist to the fried chicken sandwich.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: An emotional Theresa finds out her father-in-law has passed and then feels his presence in the following days while shopping for Holy Water.

programme.title: The Man in the Guesthouse
programme.desc: When a young couple finds someone to rent out their garage, they're happy to have an additional source of income. But soon they realise that their lodger may not be the dream tenant that they thought.

programme.title: A Roommate To Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: While in London, Theresa visits a hatmaker to dress for high tea, and is surprised when the hatmaker turns down a reading. At tea, Theresa conducts an emotional group reading.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining without wi-fi facilities might be too much for some people, but anyone wanting to unleash their wild side should join host Michael Yo for a journey to some far-out eating places.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: The zombie team has their work cut out for them when they discover a 3bed/2bath might be missing a bedroom! Termites, collapsing ceilings and some surprises might just be a budget-buster!

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Dining al-fresco hits new levels as host Michael Yo takes us on a tour of truly unique outdoor dining experiences - like noshing on Kampung-style food while seated in the middle of a river.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Grab your map and your appetite as host Michael Yo sets his sights on the best off-road eats. Buckle up as we hit the backroads for bison burgers in Alabama and Brussels sprouts behind bars in Connecticut.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: Abducted At An HBCU: A Black Girl Missing Movie
programme.desc: When ambitious college student Shannon disappears due to financial struggles, her counselor Ellen discovers a trafficking ring targeting students like her and must fight to rescue Shannon.

programme.title: My Husband's Seven Wives
programme.desc: Alan's double life is exposed when his new bride Maggie meets Pam, who claims she's also married to Alan. The two women put jealousy aside and work together to put a stop to Alan.

programme.title: Got To Leave Something
programme.desc: Veterinarian-turned-priest Michael, who came to Jeju Island and fell in love with it, now tends to a vast ranch. Nam-gil and Sang-yoon assist Father Michael in caring for the horses.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: It's our contestant's final day in Doha, and they have been granted one last chance at immunity. With only one more spot plus a big prize, Sarah, Alana, Depinder, Snezana and Laura must battle it out.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Back in the kitchen after the Doha trip, four cooks face off to avoid elimination in an emotional ëdual duelí.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The final seven contestants face a mystery box containing garlic as well as a mini mystery box!

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael celebrates the Italian flag by bringing us three different pastas in all three of its colours. She breaks down the steps to make a delicious cacio e pepe with copious amounts of cheese.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Don't feed the animals at these dining establishments, unless they're your dinner companions. Michael joins some furry and ferocious friends for supper on the ocean floor with the sea life of the Maldives.

programme.title: Casting 1147km
programme.desc: Standing on stage for the first time in front of a large crowd, each actor must perform a romanctic scene with a partner actress he has just met. Can they overcome the immense pressure?

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Inspired by her friend Brian, Rachael shows how to make her version of a beef and chorizo chilli with queso that is the perfect meal for a holiday crowd, a big-match night or a family dinner.

programme.title: The K-GIM Revolution
programme.desc: From the Korean table to tables around the world, gim is gaining global recognition. What makes gim so compelling? Michelin three-star chef Anh Sung-jae follows the journey of gim as a K-food icon.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping Of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini's disappearance captivated the nation, but her abduction story unraveled when it was revealed she was not a kidnap victim as she initially claimed.

programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past – from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys – and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies hope to quickly penetrate the Nazi Reich via Italy but instead endure a months-long slog with devastating results.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: Allied air forces engage in a ferocious and costly battle with the German Luftwaffe over the skies of Europe.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats Of WWII
programme.desc: With weather preventing Darrell Miklos and the team from diving from the boat, they attempt a risky strategy. Garth makes a solo journey to explore a deserted island where he discovers a mysterious cross.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team investigates a large wooden shipwreck that could be one of the Bermuda Triangle area's earliest victims: the long-lost SS D.H. Mount.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14)
programme.desc: Daniel and Dorien call in air support. Meanwhile, Ronnie and Ashley compete in a battle of the sexes. Black Rambo hunts for a legendary payday. While Bruce tries to save his season.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Against all odds, Disney turns 27,000 acres of muddy Florida swampland into the world's largest and most visited theme park.

programme.desc: The team continues to chase a tunnel that may run directly below the Garden Shaft and into the Baby Blob, where tests revealed high traces of silver and gold.

programme.desc: From a long-lost keepsake tied to the world’s most famous astronaut to a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies… Some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: In Alone's driest location yet, ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators, and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, Bernard Kroger and another upstart grocer come up with genius innovations that help invent the modern supermarket.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: The team continues to chase a tunnel that may run directly below the Garden Shaft and into the Baby Blob, where tests revealed high traces of silver and gold.

programme.title: Alone (S12)

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Two champions return for the opportunity to go head to head against one of our titans. After facing off against a fellow champ, only one smith will remain and be tasked with making an M1917 Naval Cutlass.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, Bernard Kroger and another upstart grocer come up with genius innovations that help invent the modern supermarket.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: An upstart named Oscar Mayer creates one of the most iconic meat brands on the planet. While Jay Hormel invents a meat product sold the world over, which becomes part of a 20-billion-dollar food empire.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: The team continues to chase a tunnel that may run directly below the Garden Shaft and into the Baby Blob, where tests revealed high traces of silver and gold.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: After two years of waiting, the team receives the Muon topography data and learns that the cavity known as Aladdin's Cave may have more secrets to tell.

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)

programme.title: Alone (S12)

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: A cartoon studio creates one of the most recognisable characters in the world. Mickey Mouse begins as a pencil sketch, and through a journey of failure, innovation, and guts becomes an American icon.

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick prepares for battle over a pair of vintage posters, but will he win the war? Meanwhile, Corey takes a look at an old fireman's megaphone. Can he ignite a deal, or will he get hosed?

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: When the team launches an illuminated swarm of drones on Skinwalker Ranch, they are stunned by a series of mysterious events.

programme.title: The UnXplained With William Shatner (S8)
programme.desc: The human mind is home to all our thoughts, dreams and memories. The brain allows us to interpret and experience the world we live in. But are there people who are "wired" differently than most of us?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built The World (S3)
programme.desc: Before toilet paper, Americans used just about anything—until the Scott brothers turned a mistake into an opportunity and invented the toilet paper roll, giving birth to a new billion-dollar industry.

programme.title: History's Deadliest With Ving Rhames (S1)
programme.desc: One spark is all it takes. From the Hindenburg disaster to Krakatoa’s violent volcanic eruption in 1883, these explosions are among history’s deadliest.

programme.title: Testimonies of War: WW2 Remembered in Japan
programme.desc: The story of Japan's '15-Year War,' with a focus on Japanese civilians living on the mainland. This documentary tracks the empire's rapid rise to its devastating final days.

programme.title: The Deadly Duo
programme.desc: The prince of the Sung Dynasty is captured by the Chin invaders and guarded by top martial arts masters. Two powerful patriots need to fight the overwhelming odds and pull off the impossible: to rescue the royal Prince and get out of the Chin stronghold alive.

programme.title: Peg O' My Heart
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Dr. Man begins treating night-shift taxi driver Choi, who is afraid to sleep and can no longer distinguish dreams from reality. During therapy, Dr. Man becomes haunted by his own disturbing and perplexing dreams. Are these night terrors the result of repressed memories, or the price of uncovering the ghosts hidden in Choi’s past?

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: Set in the Tang Dynasty, the 13 adopted sons of Sha Tuo King are all renowned as royal warriors. David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealously, leading to a gruesome family feud.

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung
programme.desc: Qing enforcer Luo Yi Hu murders rebel Chen Gui, forcing his wife and daughter Xiao Wei to flee to Guang Long Town. There, mischievous Jia Yu discovers his master’s identity as a rebel while helping Xiao Wei. After his loved ones and mentor are killed, Jia Yu sheds his playful ways and seeks vengeance, facing the Qing forces in a final battle.

programme.title: Killer Clans
programme.desc: This intriguing wuxia saga is packed with conspiracies, power schemes and sword fights to produce a perfect blend of great action and gripping drama. The movie centres around the struggle for underworld supremacy between two clans, where the line between good and evil is not always that clear-cut.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Hu seeks to avenge his father who is being killed by the White-Browed Hermit and his gang. However, he fails in his attempt and is saved by Fang Shi Yu, a youth from Shaolin whose parents are also killed by the same villains. They learn and master the advanced Shaolin style kung fu, before Fang leads Hu and the Shaolin fellows to fight the enemies.

programme.title: The Invincible Fist
programme.desc: A dedicated chief constable nicknamed “The Invincible Fist” is chasing after a band of bandits near a village one day and encounters an innocent blind girl. He quickly falls in love with her, but finds out she is the daughter of a vicious bandit. Will he kill the father of his lover?

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case?

programme.title: A Cool Fish 2
programme.desc: Scoundrel Chen San Jin and the ruthless Xue Fang Mei, who parted ways on the streets of Bangkok, are unexpectedly drawn into a kidnapping scheme by a criminal syndicate. As danger escalates and tensions flare, they must navigate betrayal and chaos. Can they survive the ordeal together?

programme.title: The New One-Armed Swordsman
programme.desc: David Chiang plays the all-new one-armed hero - a swordsman who chops off his right arm rather than live with dishonour. When the love of his life is kidnapped and his best friend is murdered by the evil gang, it is time to battle.

programme.title: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
programme.desc: Young Ai Nu is abducted and sold to the popular Four Seasons brothel run by the powerful and ruthless Madam Chun Yi. Ai Nu gets locked up in a dungeon due to her fiery attitude. Soon, a murder occurs within the brothel and a policeman must race against time to prevent a vicious revenge plot from reaching its blood-spattered conclusion.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Life Must Go On
programme.desc: When the “midnight gymnasium” programme for wayward teenage girls is at funding risk, social worker Yanki puts together a dodgeball team to compete in a match and save it. With an ex-star athlete John as the coach, the girls realize they must face their problems and overcome their challenges instead of dodging them. Can they finally win the match?

programme.title: My First of May
programme.desc: Former squash champion Teng and his wife face devastating trials when their daughter is diagnosed with muscular dystrophy and his mother with cancer. Years later, as the family struggles between holding on and letting go, they find a new connection through a small but powerful sign of hope: the faint movement of their daughter’s pinky finger.

programme.title: The Bullet Vanishes
programme.desc: A series of murders at a munitions factory sparks fear of a “Phantom Bullet” that kills without a trace. Detective Song Dong Lu and sharpshooter Guo Zhui are tasked with solving the case. As they uncover layers of corruption and conspiracy, they are drawn into a deadly game where the truth is more dangerous than the bullets.

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: This iconoclastic film retells the legend of seven Chinese patriots, who sacrificed their lives to defend against 20,000 Japanese soldiers and 50 tanks for 5 days, at a strategic key point of the Great Wall known as Pa Tou Lou Tzu.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Cliff Walkers
programme.desc: The first spy thriller movie by famous Director Zhang Yi Mou, this film follows four Communist Party special agents who embark on a secret operation in the Japanese puppet state of Manchukuo in 1932. Sold out by a traitor, the agents, who split up into two teams, find themselves surrounded by threats on all sides. Can they complete their mission?

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation…

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: Transformed from a young laboratory researcher, the thunderbolt-fisted Inframan must battle Princess Dragon Mom who wakes up from hibernation to conquer the earth with her army of mutant monsters.

programme.title: Bloody Parrot
programme.desc: A swordsman is suspected of being the thief of a treasure sent to Emperor. Through his investigation, he is led on to the trail of the supernatural “Bloody Parrot”. Poisonous things happen including a demonic possession, witches casting poison spells and disgusting autopsies. Then a dead constable turns into a vampire!

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: The White-Browed Priest supports the brutal Qing government, burning down Shaolin Temple and hunting its disciples. Shaolin’s Hung falls in love with Fang while escaping the hunt and the couple have a son before Hung is killed by the Priest. To avenge his father, Hung’s son creates a new form of martial art combining his parents’ kung fu styles.

programme.title: Clans of Intrigue
programme.desc: Heroic outlaw Chu Liu Xiang is dining with his friend Monk Wu Hua, when Gong from the Holy Water Palace appears and accuses Chu of stealing the holy water from her Palace and using it for various murders. Chu denies, and is given a month to find the murderer or be killed by Gong. To prove his innocence, Chu decides to investigate the case…

programme.title: American Girl
programme.desc: 13 year-old Fen is uprooted from LA and moves to Taipei in early 2003, when her mother is diagnosed with breast cancer. She struggles to adjust to her new life with a new school and long-separated father, and drifts away from her mother. When her younger sister is misdiagnosed with SARS, they finally open up to each other during quarantine.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan is a wealthy Kwangtung brat with a good kung fu background, he has only one ambition: to pit his wits against three shady masters of the North. The first, conman Che Tsai. The second, a professional romantic dubbed The Terrific. Terrific introduces Tou Kuan to his third rival, Thief Shih San-shou.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam is being hunted as he discovers that the mayor and the chief of medical bureau are colluding with a drug dealer. He is saved by a fishermen family and works in their friend’s grocery but the grocery owner is killed when the enemies track Sam down. Sam escapes to Shaolin to learn the cudgel style of kung fu in order to avenge his friends.

programme.title: My Blue Summer
programme.desc: Zhi has been secretly in love with Nan since she met him once as a child. After graduating high school, Zhi realizes that she and Nan are in the same university, where they get to know each other by chance and become close friends. However, Zhi is still too shy to express her love for Nan. Will this long-term crush finally turn into true love?

programme.title: Shaolin Rescuers
programme.desc: Hong Xi Guan of Shaolin is chased and wounded by a martial arts scum who took refuge in the Qing court. He is saved and healed by friends from the wet market and they hide Hong in a bean curd shop to protect him. However, Hong’s enemy finds him and ambushes him at the shop, hoping to capture Hong and all his friends.

programme.title: Life Gamble
programme.desc: Martial arts master Yu has retired for years but is invited to join force with another master Tao to fight against the four famous thieves and retrieve the stolen Dragon Jade. However, Tao’s real plan is to possess the treasure himself and kills Yu after he defeats the thieves...

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: A mysterious new gang, the Masked Avengers, is slaughtering the martial world's greatest heroes. To stop them, three fearless fighters must track down the gang's hidden lair in Jingyang Town and put an end to their reign of terror.

programme.title: My Date With A Vampire
programme.desc: Demon slayer Ma Siu Ling crosses paths with a mysterious detective while probing bizarre supernatural cases. From initial distrust to allies, they join forces against an ancient threat looming over the city. As the blood moon rises, they must uncover secrets of their past lives to prevent a modern-day apocalypse.

programme.title: My Country, My Parents
programme.desc: Set in 4 different eras in China, the 4-part anthology about ‘home and country’ is directed by Wu Jing, Zhang Zi Yi, Xu Zheng and Shen Teng, who also star in their own story. The movie depicts how the ‘fathers’ forge ahead through the struggle of times, defending strong family ties and passing on the ‘fighting’ spirit through generations.

programme.title: The Lychee Road
programme.desc: A single lychee sparks a Tang Dynasty “Mission Impossible”! Low-ranking official Li Shan De must deliver it a thousand miles in three days to satisfy a consort’s craving. Racing against time, he encounters obstacles and absurd demands, turning the journey into a satirical adventure filled with tension and unexpected twists.

programme.title: Vengeance is a Golden Blade
programme.desc: Convoy Master Li’s wife has an affair with his rival Long, who plans to steal Li’s Golden Blade and kill him as well as his young daughter. Li and his daughter manage to escape and the latter grows up to be a skilled swordswoman who vows to avenge her mother’s death – a lie told by Li. The truth is revealed when she sees her mother alive by chance.

programme.title: Heaven Sword and Dragon Sabre 2
programme.desc: Only by bringing together the powerful Heaven Sword and the mighty Dragon Sabre can six martial arts sects struggling for supremacy be saved in this thrilling sequel to Chu Yuan's original hit.

programme.title: We are Family
programme.desc: Struggling as an extra, Chi Kwong joins a rent-a-family company run by Carlos and aspiring actress Catherine, and rent themselves out as make-believe relatives. As they surrogate different families, they unravel the complexities of family relationships, forging deeper connections along the way.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: Set in the Warlord Era, General Hou is betrayed by his subordinate Cao Man and they find themselves on opposing sides as the war escalates. The ultimate battle ensues when Cao Man’s army is set to besiege the peaceful Shaolin Temple. General Hou, together with the Shaolin monks, are forced to take up arms to protect the beloved temple.

programme.title: The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Wang's odd behaviour and quirky ideas make him a social outcast. His teenage nephew Zhou, who is ashamed of his stutter, becomes Wang's only friend. Together, these misfits challenge traditional family expectations and social misunderstandings, supporting and inspiring each other as they seek their own paths in life.

programme.title: The Kid With A Tattoo
programme.desc: Young Bao Tong witnesses the brutal murder of his kung fu master by a vicious villain. A large eagle tattoo on Bao’s chest was spotted by the killer as he escapes. Can Bao escape from the killer?

programme.title: Bosai: Lava Flows
programme.desc: The hazard map for Mt. Fuji was revised in 2021, revealing the possibility of greater damage from lava flows. We'll look at what lies behind those assumptions and what countermeasures can be taken.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Matsue is known as the "city of water." It is home to Lake Shinji, which is famous for its shijimi clams. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we see the lake's changing colors and expressions.

programme.title: NewsRoom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Ito Junji is a horror manga artist renowned worldwide for his intricate artwork and unique vision, which earned him a place in the prestigious Eisner Awards Hall of Fame in 2025. What inspires him?

programme.title: A Culture Built with Wood Hida
programme.desc: The Hida region in Gifu Prefecture has some of Japan's most extensive broadleaf forests and has been home to artisans who possess sophisticated woodworking skills, such as kigumi or wood joinery.

programme.title: Ramen Japan 5min.
programme.desc: A whirlwind tour of Hokkaido's best ramen! Why not whet your appetite with the origin story of Sapporo miso ramen?

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Takinogawa River
programme.desc: We travel to a well-known tourist resort just outside of Edo, where day-trippers are enjoying river recreation and forest walks, praying at local shrines, and sitting down for riverside picnics.

programme.desc: In Singapore, Lontong is a traditional Malay snack. Host Kym & Pastry Chef Wee visit traditional stalls to learn about the methods of making Lontong rice cake.

programme.title: May's Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: May is always trying to give not only recipes but also changing how people look at cooking, making it fun and relatable.

programme.title: The Cook Up with Adam Liaw (S4)
programme.desc: The world is our oyster and in this episode, Adam and guests Dave Novak and Heather Jeong share their shellfish dishes.

programme.title: Smallville S1 18
programme.desc: Clark seeks election as class president, hoping for the opportunity to be a normal kid.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 05
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke search for the ultimate lipstick hack, explore beeswax as a waterproofing technique, and welcome an old tire into the All-Star Club. Plus, this week's "Hack Master" will go to the extreme by hacking Kevin's brain.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 06
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke put the best shaving hacks to the test in the ultimate beard-off, and find out if using a drill to eat corn is hack or wack. Plus, they'll welcome toothpaste into the All-Star Club and use pencil lead to make a light bulb.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 01
programme.desc: Michael breezes into the Windy City to shock and amaze the Chicago locals. In a health store, he sells a supplement that proves you are what you drink, and at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 02
programme.desc: In a local Chicago diner, Michael brings new meaning to the term "hold the pickles." Plus, he discovers an aggressive new breed of fungus at a park, and later, he helps a coworker disappear from work early in a hospital warehouse.

programme.title: Container Wars S2 10
programme.desc: The biggest auction on the planet sails to the middle of the Pacific Ocean when a mysterious container is dredged up from the bottom of the sea. Royal rumors spark golden expectations, but how could have any of the waterlogged loot survived?

programme.title: Container Wars S3 1
programme.desc: The bidders are back and the competition is fiercer than ever! Mo & Ty set their sights on a container from Mexico, but could everything inside be damaged goods? The Israelis pin their hopes on a mysterious wooden crate, and bids go through the roof on a one-of-a-kind open-air container.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 1
programme.desc: Old rivals unite when Brandon and Jesse are faced with the unthinkable: join forces or stand alone to gamble on a once-in-a-lifetime locker. Then, a vintage motorcycle and rare car parts create big cash for one of our slickest auction heroes. And later, the Taylor Brothers are in for the fight of their lives when they leave the Deep South for the promise of California gold. It's an old-world battle that could lead to a new world order.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 01
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q take their talents to Miami for the season premiere, pulling all new pranks on the beach. The guys zip around in scooters controlled by the other Jokers, and the loser will come face-to-face with an alligator.

programme.title: Smallville S1 18
programme.desc: Clark seeks election as class president, hoping for the opportunity to be a normal kid.

programme.title: ER S2 21
programme.desc: Hathaway testifies about Shep's behavior. Jeanie's husband thinks that he may have the flu, but tests reveal that Al is HIV positive. Lewis seeks the help of a therapist.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S7 19
programme.desc: Sheldon gets quite a surprise when he visits his mom in Houston, while Raj's "Murder Mystery" party causes tension within the gang.

programme.title: Friends S8 22
programme.desc: Rachel's pregnancy goes beyond her projected delivery date.

programme.title: Dirty Money S1 5
programme.desc: Approaching Fleet Week inspires the Direstas to hunt for some salable military gems. In order to make any flea market profits the guys will have to live by the mantra, "Buy low, sell high and modify."

programme.title: Dirty Money S1 6
programme.desc: A gang of extreme jumpers nets the Direstas a commissioned Harley-inspired pogo stick sale.

programme.title: Container Wars S2 10

programme.title: Friends S8 23
programme.desc: In the one-hour season finale, Rachel waits in the hospital maternity ward.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 1

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: A man (Ewan McGregor) living in a futuristic sterile colony begins to question his circumscribed existence when his friend (Scarlett Johansson) is chosen to go to the Island – reportedly the last uncontaminated place on earth.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc:
Behind every great love is a great story.
In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple.
Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love.
Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.desc: Approaching Fleet Week inspires the Direstas to hunt for some salable military gems. In order to make any flea market profits the guys will have to live by the mantra, "Buy low, sell high and modify."

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 03
programme.desc: At a market, Michael reveals an amazing credit card hack, and at a science shop, he demonstrates how far stem cell research has come. Later, Michael spooks a gardener who's certain that angry gnomes are hunting him down!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 04
programme.desc: Michael discovers a ferocious new breed of animal at a park, customers are steeped in confusion when Michael invades a local tea shop, and a woman gets her feathers ruffled when she realizes she's a witness to a transformation.

programme.title: Dirty Money S1 7
programme.desc: The Direstas meet a shrewd businessman who owns an aeronautic graveyard. Has John met his haggling equal? Can Jimmy create some unique aviation art?

programme.title: Dirty Money S1 8
programme.desc: In addition to restoring an old dartboard, a rusty neon bar sign forces the guys to head to a buddy's shop to help bring it back to life.

programme.title: Smallville S1 19
programme.desc: Clark confronts an unexpected foe when a talented art student, Justin Gaines (ADAM BRODY), returns to school after being hit by a car.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 07
programme.desc: Explore hacks for all ages, from staying clean while eating ribs, to staying young in your golden years. Plus, watch hacks for making soap and hanging shelves, and get ready to welcome the twist tie to the All Star Club.

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 08
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin discover the best hacks for stretching out shoes and removing coffee stains. Plus, they'll welcome hangers into the All Star Club, explore the most delicious hack from history, and meet the newest Hack Hero.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 03
programme.desc: At a market, Michael reveals an amazing credit card hack, and at a science shop, he demonstrates how far stem cell research has come. Later, Michael spooks a gardener who's certain that angry gnomes are hunting him down!

programme.title: Container Wars S3 2
programme.desc: Mo and the Israelis partner up on a container from Africa, but will their alliance result in fool's gold? Matt attacks the competition for a can full of Chinese goods, but it could blow up in his face. And later, things take a bizarre turn when a bunch of strange items from an odd collector spark an intense bidding war

programme.title: Container Wars S3 3
programme.desc: Four containers, straight from the Big Apple, make their way to Long Beach, CA. A can full of broken dummies generates some serious buzz, while a billionaire's unclaimed goods have everyone seeing dollar signs. Plus, a one-of-a-kind auction that includes the container itself.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 2
programme.desc: The competition heats up as Brandon and Lori find themselves in an all out bidding war with the tough-talking Taylor brothers. Amidst the chaos, Jesse goes all-in for a locker that could be hiding an expert marksman's rare weapons. And later, Sean unveils a bin whose stench is so rancid it sends the buyers running. But when one of our competitors takes a gamble, the entire group is blown away by the score.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S7 02
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q teach fencing, and one Joker is especially "en garde" when forced to face an Olympian. The guys trim away their dignity as hairstylists, and the punished Joker melts down during a presentation on climate change.

programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q teach fencing, and one Joker is especially "en garde" when forced to face an Olympian. The guys trim away their dignity as hairstylists, and the punished Joker melts down during a presentation on climate change.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 05
programme.desc: Michael reveals the transformative properties of fruits and vegetables, and shows a caterer the true power of dairy products. Plus, an antique store customer is stunned when a species of termite literally chews through the scenery!

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S5 06
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods. Finally, at the Navy Yard, Michael pushes his skills to the limit when he attempts one of his most ambitious feats yet - tricking two people at the same time!

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 02

programme.title: Hack My Life S2 03

programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke search for the ultimate lipstick hack, explore beeswax as a waterproofing technique, and welcome an old tire into the All-Star Club. Plus, this week's "Hack Master" will go to the extreme by hacking Kevin's brain.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Manny Tsigas presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: In Biscuit Week, our eleven amateur bakers create their Signature fondant biscuits, delicious Peanut and, Choc Chip Explosive Wheels and for Showstopper, a magical Biscuit Game.

programme.title: Audra's Eat, Roam, Relish
programme.desc: Audra Morrice journeys to the colourful island state of Sarawak, Malaysia where she indulges in a cultural feast for the senses via its rich gastronomy. Audra explores Malaysian roots through food, family and local culture.

programme.title: Field To Feast
programme.desc: This beloved Australian citrus snack gets The Fruit Nerd treatment exploring Navel oranges in Mildura and how the Valencia's grown in Barham are the perfect juicing orange.

programme.title: Play On
programme.desc: Migrant families and athletes of multicultural heritage are changing Australia's sporting culture. From social sport to elite athletes, Paul Kennedy examines how sport helps build community, identity and opportunity.

programme.title: Diabolical: The Epstein Files
programme.desc: It's the scandal that shocked Americans and rocked the Trump administration. A legal and political saga that shattered fundamental beliefs that all are equal in the eyes of the law. What do the Epstein Files reveal?

programme.title: Judgment: Cases That Changed Australia
programme.desc: Two men walk into Hobart police station, confess to a crime and begin High Court battles for justice, respect and marriage equality.

programme.title: Gardening Australia
programme.desc: We meet a collector who has dedicated his life to finding and breeding plants from around the world.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast
programme.desc: All the news you need to start your weekend. Fauziah Ibrahim and Johanna Nicholson bring you the latest news, interviews, politics, culture, weather and global affairs. Plus sport with Jared Coote.

programme.title: Weekend Breakfast

programme.title: Liar Liar

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: Thirteen years after an explosion in an abandoned building killed their friend Noo Aon, Tong and his group return to the site—now their university campus. When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Escaping an abusive past, Jennifer moves into Apartment 212 for a fresh start, only to wake each day with painful bite marks. She soon discovers an ancient parasite that feeds on human flesh lurking within the walls. As attacks intensify, she must confront a nightmare more terrifying than her past before it consumes her.

programme.title: Endless Love
programme.desc: A young girl encounters a novelist in a bar and quickly falls in love with him. However, it turns out she has fallen into a trap set up by the novelist and his ex-girlfriend who is a ghost with a disfigured face. The journey of revenge and ultimate terror has just begun!

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: A Sealed Book
programme.desc: The world descends into darkness when a sealed book, said to command the forces of the universe, is unearthed in an underground palace in the desert. As adventurers race to claim its power, the palace gates open, unleashing an unseen terror and heralding a catastrophe beyond imagination.

programme.title: Hide & Seek
programme.desc: Thirteen years after an explosion in an abandoned building killed their friend Noo Aon, Tong and his group return to the site—now their university campus. When a girl who looks exactly like Noo Aon appears, a childhood game turns into a lethal ritual. One by one, the friends are hunted by a vengeful spirit determined to settle a long-overdue score.

programme.title: Apartment 212
programme.desc: Escaping an abusive past, Jennifer moves into Apartment 212 for a fresh start, only to wake each day with painful bite marks. programme.title: Endless Love

programme.title: Anak Perjanjian Syaitan 2
programme.desc: Haunted since childhood, orphan Azlinda believes her torment stems from her parents' dark history. Her friends Zurina, Wati, and Ustaz join forces to end her suffering, but a malevolent demon interrupts their efforts. Will Azlinda succeed in severing the cursed ties that bind her, or is she destined to remain trapped in darkness forever?

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: Global warming has awakened a malevolent spore from beneath an ancient ice field, unleashing a horrific plague that ravages humanity. Fleeing the chaos, Meadow takes refuge in an abandoned cabin. Together with other strangers, she fights to survive as some succumb to the plague, transforming into ravenous hunters who now stalk the living.

programme.title: Open the Coffin
programme.desc: Ghost Hand and his tomb raiders resurface in Jiang City to seek gold in ancient tombs after a 3-year absence. They released an evil spirit from a coffin and all four died at home eventually. Poison and pinholes in the corpses become the sole clue for police investigation. A tomb raid now unfolds as a perplexing and mysterious case.

programme.title: Guns of Eden
programme.desc: During a camping trip deep in the mountains, former Buffalo cop Megan and her friends stumble upon the local sheriff unlawfully executing a drug trafficker. Spotted and marked for death, they find every escape route sealed. To cover up his crime, the sheriff summons an armed militia to hunt them down—triggering a deadly chase with no way out.

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: An Unquiet Grave
programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.desc: A year after Jamie's wife tragically died in a car accident, he persuades her sister, Ava, to accompany him to the accident site to perform a peculiar ritual. As the night progresses, it becomes evident that Jamie harbours sinister motives.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder occurs, and the suspects are killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy spanning two generations.

programme.title: Mama Ghost
programme.desc: In a coastal town, a forbidden romance sparks between Rico and Sisca, and their love unleashes a malevolent spirit. As chilling deaths plague the town, past secrets are being unraveled and the town is possessed by evil and fear. Rico must defy destiny and fight against the evil spirit to save his loved one.

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: The Ghost Writer
programme.desc: A struggling writer must write a hit novel to save his career. He retreats to his childhood home where his father, also a successful writer, died mysteriously. Upon discovering his father's final manuscript, he realizes it's far superior to anything he could create. He decides to plagiarize the work, setting off a series of horrifying events.

programme.title: The Ice Cream Truck
programme.desc: Mary moves back to her suburban hometown as her husband is relocated there for work. While waiting for her husband in their new house, Mary becomes the target of an evil slasher that stalks the suburbs in an ice-cream truck. She soon learns that the suburbs are not what they seem...

programme.desc: As the police investigate a gang murder case, another mysterious paper man murder occurs, and the suspects are killed one by one. Continuing to track the clues of the case, the police finally unveil a hidden secret and tragedy spanning two generations.

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Evie
programme.desc: When young Evie discovers a cursed necklace washed up on the beach, she is unaware of the malevolent force tied to it. As the necklace's dark power begins to grip her, she inadvertently awakens a deadly water demon intent on claiming her and everyone she holds dear.

programme.title: 7ujuh
programme.desc: 7 friends go on a road trip to a remote bungalow run by a village head and his daughter Suri. They host a party and ask Suri to help. Things spiral out of control and Suri is raped. Before killing herself, she curses them to be haunted in their dreams. As the friends are killed off one by one, they must break the curse to escape their deadly fate.

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A woman in hospital accidentally discovers her husband’s affair. On the verge of breakdown, she begins to encounter a “stranger” who claims to also be a victim of the affair. Is this entity a figment of her imagination or a vengeful spirit? As she struggles to control her thoughts and actions, can she stop herself from hurting those around her?

programme.title: Red Rain
programme.desc: Based on true events, a young scientist who specialises in the study of aliens and extraterrestrials sets out to uncover the mystery behind a series of strange occurrences in Kerala.

programme.title: Ghost Wedding
programme.desc: Photographer Zhi Cheng is entangled with a "woman in red", leading to the deaths of his relatives one by one. When the girl he likes, Si Tong, also dies mysteriously, Zhi Cheng vows to find out the truth but ends up revealing the secret of a "ghost marriage"...

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A first-timer is arrested for reckless driving while on the way to vacation, and a man is brought in on a brandishing a firearm charge while open-carrying in Virginia Beach.

programme.title: The Jars Murderer
programme.desc: After murdering and dismembering his victims, a Hong Kong taxi driver often kept their organs and indulged in necrophilia.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: When a 70-year-old grandmother passes away suspiciously on a road trip, investigators uncover a sinister murder plot while searching for her remains.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: 26-year-old Timothy 'Rambo' Ramsey is killed in a drive-by shooting, but the investigation yields little evidence, and the case goes cold for six years.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Women On Death Row
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: Malaysian Drug Mules
programme.desc: Follow the Royal Malaysian Police as they go in pursuit of sinister Nigerian gangs who deceive or coerce hundreds of Malaysian women into smuggling drugs.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country. A suspect crashes into a jail; a woman has too much fun at the movies; a vandal wreaks havoc at a winery; and more!

programme.title: My Strange Arrest (S2)
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: an innocent woman insists on going to jail with her arrested BFF; a thief absconds with a giant life-size stick figure; and more!

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2)
programme.desc: Residents of Robeson, Pennsylvania were stunned when Ashley Kline went missing on New Year's Eve. The 12-day search turned up several suspects until investigators uncovered suspicious text messages.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S1)
programme.desc: A first-timer is arrested for reckless driving while on the way to vacation, and a man is brought in on a brandishing a firearm charge while open-carrying in Virginia Beach.

programme.title: The Garden City Butcher
programme.desc: Passing himself off as a friendly tourist in Singapore, he preyed on unsuspecting travellers, bludgeoning them to death before disposing their chopped up bodies.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: August 29, 2006, Riverside County, CA. Deputies from the Riverside County Sheriff's Department respond to the scene of an abandoned vehicle in a remote area of the Gavilan Hills.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A defendant strips naked and shadowboxes during his hearing; the family of a murder victim attacks the defendant in court; a convicted gunman begs for forgiveness from a victim's family; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A grieving uncle screams at his sister-in-law in court over his missing nephew; an autoworker checks in to his virtual hearing from the assembly line; a road rage killer blames his victim; and more.

programme.title: First Blood (S1)
programme.desc: African-American women in the Mt Pleasant neighbourhood of Cleveland were vanishing. Their families cried for help, but no one knew what was happening. No one except Anthony Sowell.

programme.title: Ozark Law (S1)
programme.desc: As summer rolls on, the police officers try to keep the Lake of the Ozarks community safe. Detective Sergeant Mark Kordula gets called to the aid of a bloodied and concussed bar patron lying in the road.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S16)
programme.desc: In Tulsa, two men are murdered in a parking lot, but a gun from another shooting incident leads detectives to their suspect. As prosecutors prepare for the trial, key evidence goes missing.

programme.desc: In April 1985, two western teenagers studying in Hong Kong were set upon by a gang of Chinese youths, who proceeded to torture and stab them to death.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1)
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a 15-year-old boy who was gunned down after walking his younger sister home.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S1)
programme.desc: With the help of Det. Johnson and Det Stewart, Det. Diesburg pieces together what happened one Saturday afternoon when two young men opened fire on two teens driving down the street.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Kim Edwards and Lucas Markham were both outsiders from troubled homes. They felt they understood each other when no one else did. Together they made a plan to get rid of the mum and sister Kim resented.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: A painful breakup ends in tragedy when a correctional officer fatally wounds his ex-girlfriend. The prosecution say he's a killer, but the defence argues he was under attack and shot in self-defence.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: Angel's life has spiralled as unchecked shopping habits have taken over her finances and her home. With reduced work hours but persistent spending, her home is now dangerously overcrowded.

programme.title: Hoarders (S16)
programme.desc: A burst water pipe above her living room threatens to worsen conditions, with water soaking into piles of clothes and other items, creating a breeding ground for mould.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S1)
programme.desc: From Taiwan to Singapore, addicted gamblers bet on anything and everything, with ruthless bookies using extortion to ensure payment.

programme.title: Asia's Underworld (S1)
programme.desc: The Krystal-9 gang in Malaysia would ruthlessly resort to blackmail, extortion, kidnapping and torture against those who can't repay their debts.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'Invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: C Dans L'Air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: L'echappee Belge
programme.desc: Host Zoe Brunet and Adrien cross the Tarentaise by mountain bike and kayak. From Val d'Isere to Bourg-Saint-Maurice, they criss-cross the Vanoise National Park in a sumptuous Alpine setting.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Chiens Et Chats Sans Collier
programme.desc: Sisko, a recently arrived Australian shepherd, meets potential adopters. Aurelie visits Poly the cat, who is very cuddly after his surgery. Meanwhile, Tiffany and Christophe take Joy and Bebe for an animal assisted therapy session in a retirement home.

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Version Francaise
programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week!

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.desc: Sisko, a recently arrived Australian shepherd, meets potential adopters. Aurelie visits Poly the cat, who is very cuddly after his surgery. Meanwhile, Tiffany and Christophe take Joy and Bebe for an animal assisted therapy session in a retirement home.

programme.desc: Host Zoe Brunet and Adrien cross the Tarentaise by mountain bike and kayak. From Val d'Isere to Bourg-Saint-Maurice, they criss-cross the Vanoise National Park in a sumptuous Alpine setting.

programme.title: Edmond Et Lucy
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: Pompon Ours
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Contact
programme.desc: Georges St-Pierre is considered one of the most complete mixed martial arts athletes on the planet. He talks about his victory in 2004, which left him with ''a false sense of confidence'' and the reasons for his recent depression.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Jardin Extraordinaire
programme.desc: 60 years of travelling across all continents, to every corner of the world. 60 years recounting life on Earth! For the Garden's anniversary: exceptional archives, never before seen and fabulous images, and behind the scenes of the show...

programme.title: Tendance XXI
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: On Acheve Bien Les Chevaux
programme.desc: Bruno Bouche, Clement Hervieu-Leger and Daniel San Pedro take on Horace McCoy's noir novel about dance marathons in the United States in 1929, where participants were prepared to dance to death. 32 dancers, 9 actors and 4 musicians in a visceral, out-of-this-world dance-theatre experience.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Sourdough breads, brioches and generous recipes are the keys to his success on social networks. Known under the pseudonym Cook as you feel it, Kodjo is a self-taught cook who arrived from Togo in France. A father and inspiring creator, he turns a childhood passion into a space for emancipation.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner
programme.desc: In the Vosges forest the authorities find the lifeless body of a journalist and animal rights activist, along with that of a lynx. The local hunters immediately become the prime suspects. A tragedy that exacerbates an already virulent conflict between hunters and the animal rights movement.

programme.title: Secrets Des Profondeurs
programme.desc: Sam and Mario set off in search of the ships torpedoed by the Germans just off the Newfoundland coast during the Second World War.

programme.title: En Marge Du Monde
programme.desc: Felix trained as a lawyer before leaving the fast-moving life of Montreal behind him to answer the call of the wild and become a hunter-gatherer in Chibougamau forest. programme.title: Les Heros Du Patrimoine
programme.desc: Saint-Vaast-la-Hougue, in the Cotentin, where volunteers are working to restore two towers designed by Vauban and built by Napoleon. programme.title: Le Journal De France 2

programme.title: Sous Le Tapis
programme.desc: Odile and Jean are getting ready to host their children and grandchildren at their house in the country for Odile's birthday. When Jean suddenly dies of cardiac arrest, Odile panics and hides the body under the bed...

programme.title: Anushan
programme.desc: The only son of Tamil parents, 13-year-old Anushan much prefers rap to his native culture. When his uncle arrives from Sri Lanka, he finds himself sharing his room and his daily life with him for a few days.

programme.title: Pour Toi Flora
programme.desc: Remi Dumont, an indigenous boarding school survivor in search of healing and redemption wants to tell his story.

programme.desc: Barny Maurice is a travelling man who spent a decade on the road with his circus troupe. He then chose the simple life of a gypsy caravan and built up close links with his horses. Today he has settled in one place but proposes trips for tourists seeking adventure.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs
programme.desc: While walking the Camino de Santiago, Christele and Hubert never imagined their lives would radically change during a stop in Lectoure, in the Gers. They fell in love with an old building, abandoned for nearly thirty years, and restored it.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: How does the Beauregard festival, which brings together tens of thousands of people near Caen, manage to limit its impact on the environment? Visit the Champ des Bruyeres park, a former racecourse redeveloped into a green space. Making a chocolate dessert based on algae.
